items.name: stone of agility
items.description: This item will give you a speed increase for 15 minutes.

items.name: rose of renewal
items.description: A magical and extremely rare type of rose.

items.name: sea serpent's scale
items.description: This scale comes from a sea serpent that was terrorizing the oceans the area around Qeynos.

items.name: Randerith's blood
items.description: This is the blood of a vampire.

items.name: Raldithar's blood
items.description: This is the blood of a vampire.

items.name: Quil`Eyne's Journal
items.description: This is the journal of Quil`Eyne, formerly an Agent of Neriak.

items.name: enchanted treant branch
items.description: This branch has been been enchanted with magical properties.  It is much sturdier than it looks.

items.name: corin's petrified heart
items.description: The petrified heart of the deathknight Corin Bileheart.

items.name: shoddy pickclaw key
items.description: This key was obviously made by goblins, it's craftmanship is quite poor.

items.name: archon's heart
items.description: A large beating heart, it pulses even after death.

items.name: zombie flesh suit
items.description: A suit sewn from zombie flesh and stitched with sinew.

items.name: weak herbs
items.description: Slightly foul-tasting. Anyway, it regenerates power over time quite well.

items.name: weak roots
items.description: A watery concoction made chiefly of liquified roots... that orcs love. Heals over time quite well.

items.name: Alacrity Potion
items.description: The liquid within the bottle seems to be agitated. Drinking it increases your movement speed.

items.name: preserved spider eye
items.description: This is the eye of a rock spider. It is preserved and in great condition.

items.name: ice glyph
items.description: This glyph glows with the power of the arctic.

items.name: crusty goblin eye
items.description: This eye came from a very powerful goblin.

items.name: bitter roots
items.description: Really thick concoction made chiefly of liquified roots... that orcs love. Heals over time quite well.

items.name: wooden cylinder gasket
items.description: This gasket was made years ago out of wood. Someone who studies history  might be interested in this.

items.name: geode talisman
items.description: This nodule of stone will open upon command, revealing a space within. It appears to be a kind of stone pouch.

items.name: mystical parchment
items.description: This parchment can be used to obtain abilities from the right spell smith.

items.name: Stone of Enlightened Physique
items.description: This stone allows you to clear your mind and harness tranquility, allowing you to gain a bit more experience than normal.

items.name: Spitestone
items.description: This stone allows you to harness the darkness inside, allowing you to gain a bit more experience than normal.

items.name: Anniversary Certificate
items.description: Present this to Scoutmaster Noraah in Blackwater to have a second chance to reset your path.

items.name: wand of downpour
items.description: This is a magical wand. The wood handle has been engraved with an image of a great storm.

items.name: silver wand of downpour
items.description: This is a magical wand. The silver handle has been engraved with an image of a great storm.

items.name: 10 point faction token
items.description: This shows you have earned 10 points of storyteller faction.

items.name: tasty froglok skins
items.description: This portion of the froglok's skin is considered a delicacy in some areas of Norrath.

items.name: totem of dreams
items.description: This totem is said to carry a person's dreams.

items.name: silver coins
items.description: A pile of silver coins.

items.name: Efreet statuette
items.description: The statuette closely resembles an Efreet.

items.name: phosphoric globe
items.description: A globe that glows very brightly.

items.name: heartsblood alloy studs
items.description: Extremely rare magical alloy studs prized by tailors for their ability to adjust health,  wisdom, and arcane resistance.

items.name: evil eye cornea
items.description: This cornea, when disolved, might add thickness to a dish.

items.name: heartsblood alloy
items.description: An extremely rare magical alloy prized by armorers for its ability to make the individual feel better in several areas.

items.description: This staff is cold to the touch.

items.description: This protected the ice giant from the icy winds.
